title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Northampton
subtitle: Dance together, find your vibe!
description: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Northampton — Dance together while everyone finds their perfect vibe! Three channels of family-friendly fun.
fullDescription:
Have you ever tried dancing like nobody's watching... with headphones?

At our Family Silent Disco, everyone gets their own soundtrack while sharing the same dance floor! Kids can bounce to Party Hits, Teens to Charts/Trending while Parents groove to 80s/90s/00s favourites - all in the same space without compromising on music choices!

Perfect for kids 4+ and parents get to join the party too (in fact, the parents regularly enjoy it even more!). Three channels means everyone in the family finds their perfect music vibe.

We carefully curate all three family-friendly channels, drawing from our experience hosting both adult decades parties with Boombastic and school sessions through The Silent Disco Project.
highlights: 🎧 THREE CHANNELS: Blue Party, Red Throwback, Green Chart – everyone finds their groove|👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 AGES 4+: Kids love it, parents often enjoy it even more!|🔀 SWITCH ANYTIME: Flip between channels whenever you fancy a change|🎉 DOORS 1:30PM: Party channel playing as you arrive, full experience 2-4pm

channels.name: PARTY
channels.artists: Disney Hits, Trolls, Moana, Baby Shark, YMCA, Can't Stop The Feeling

channels.name: THROWBACK
channels.artists: Mr Brightside, Dancing Queen, Wannabe, Spice Girls, Take That

channels.name: CHART
channels.artists: Sabrina Carpenter, Dua Lipa, Harry Styles, Clean Chart & Trending
